title: Complete valid-work preservation inventory defined
objective: Preserve every repository, control-plane, parent-shadow, consumer, and evidence surface before correcting the LifeOS and Meta topology.

capture: HEAD, branches, remotes, reflogs, worktrees, status, fsck
file count, byte count, permissions, device and inode
work_items.restore: Move the repository back to its recorded source path and run git worktree repair using the receipt.

capture: HEAD, branches, reflogs, status, fsck, file and byte counts
work_items.restore: Move Meta and its nested repositories back, restore the manifest and GitKB receipt, and run worktree repair.

capture: empty parent .kb including derived code index
usr, var, artifacts, release, worktrees, and evidence path inventory
work_items.restore: Restore checksummed surfaces only after their active consumers are retargeted to the prior topology.

capture: profile source URLs and runtime frontdoors
absolute path references and live process cwd/exe references
work_items.restore: Restore archived owner inputs and restart only the affected consumers.

capture: local and remote stale branch inventory
work_items.restore: Recreate a deleted branch only from the archived bundle and recorded commit ID.

completion_gate: All capture artifacts exist beneath one checksummed archive root, every item has a restore command, and PRESERVE-001.proof.json records zero unarchived destructive actions.
